notes: Created recursive audit registry, versioned markdown owners, added read policies to reduce token-heavy rereads, installed catch-recursive-audit skill, included physical-phone debug loop guidance, and switched examples to direct Dart script invocation to avoid package build hooks.
Moved active widget cleanup state and recurring rules into structured registry files; pruned widget_cleanup_todo.md to a compact pointer and archived full history.
Reviewed 24 tappable candidates, found existing labels/tooltips/Semantics wrappers, refined scanner to report only unresolved tappables, and moved WIDGET-SEMANTICS-001 to watch.

commands: flutter test test/core/catch_primitives_test.dart test/chats/chat_screen_test.dart test/chats/matches_list_screen_test.dart test/dashboard/dashboard_screen_test.dart test/dashboard/dashboard_full_view_model_test.dart
notes: Migrated first core/chat/dashboard spacing batch from 4-point Sizes.p* constants to CatchSpacing.s* where values were on the canonical scale. Scanner legacy spacing count is now 115; remaining fine-grained p6/p10/p14/p18 values are intentionally left for later feature-specific passes.

Migrated payments, public profile, and reviews 4-point Sizes.p* spacing to CatchSpacing.s*. Removed a stale public profile spacing import. Scanner legacy spacing count is now 80; p14 component padding remains as compatibility spacing for later semantic review.

Split spacing scanner output into canonical 4-point migration candidates and fine-grained compatibility helpers so future passes track actionable spacing debt without counting intentional p2/p6/p10/p14/p18 values as the same class of work.

Migrated swipes, force-update, and match-celebration canonical spacing to CatchSpacing.s*. Removed stale swipe empty-state spacing import. Canonical spacing scanner count is now 40; fine-grained compatibility remains 21.

commands: flutter test test/calendar/calendar_screen_test.dart test/chats/message_bubble_test.dart test/runs/attendance_sheet_screen_test.dart test/runs/runs_widgets_test.dart test/runs/run_map_view_model_test.dart test/runs/run_detail_widgets_test.dart test/safety/settings_screen_test.dart test/safety/settings_controller_test.dart
notes: Migrated remaining non-profile canonical spacing candidates in calendar, chat bubble, runs, and safety/settings to CatchSpacing.s*. Removed stale run screen spacing imports. Canonical spacing scanner count is now 21, all isolated to user_profile and intentionally paired with PROFILE-001.

Replaced ProfileScreen's blank null-profile branch with an explicit sliver-aware missing-profile state, migrated remaining user_profile canonical spacing to CatchSpacing.s*, and cleared canonical spacing scanner candidates to zero. PROFILE-001 remains active pending physical/device verification of the sliver TabBarView route if the user's live screen is still blank.

Checked for physical-device verification path after the profile code pass. flutter devices found macOS and Chrome only; Suvrat's iPhone was not available over cable or LAN, so PROFILE-001 remains blocked on live device confirmation.

Migrated ProfileScreen away from NestedScrollView + TabBarView to a single sliver-native CustomScrollView. A Profile-owned TabController now controls which sliver body is mounted, and CatchTopBarTabBar accepts an optional explicit TabController so the Profile/Preview row can stay pinned in the sliver header. Device verification remains blocked until the user's iPhone is connected.
